channel.title: The B.E. Journal of Economic Analysis & Policy
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in The B.E. Journal of Economic Analysis & Policy

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Selection Efficiency in Multiple-Prize Tournaments with Sabotage
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2024-0172

item.title: Priced Out: Do Adolescents from Low-Income Families Respond More to Cost-Sharing in Primary Care?
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2024-0229

item.title: International Commodity-Tax Competition and Asymmetric Producer Prices
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2022-0332

item.title: Absolute versus Relative Poverty and Wealth: Cooperation in the Presence of Between-Group Inequality
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2024-0350

item.title: Cross Ownership Under Strategic Tax Policy
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2024-0051

item.title: Central Bank Digital Currencies: Experimental Evidence of Deposit Conversion
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2024-0192

item.title: Earthquakes and Intertemporal Preferences: A Field Study in Italy
item.description: Article by Giuseppe Attanasi, Annamaria Nese, Patrizia Sbriglia, Luigi Senatore DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bejeap-2024-0180
